name: qalam-rtl-markdown
displayName: Master RTL — RTL for Claude Code, Markdown & AI Chat
description: Master RTL makes Claude Code, Markdown and AI chat truly right-to-left in VS Code. Read & write Persian (فارسی), Arabic (العربية), Hebrew (עברית) and Urdu (اردو) naturally: one-click RTL for the Claude Code chat panel, 11 beautiful color themes for the Claude Code chat (Dracula, Nord, Tokyo Night, Catppuccin…), a real RTL Markdown editor with live preview, 11 reading themes, colorful code highlighting, a live outline, a formatting toolbar and reusable AI prompt templates. English and code stay left-to-right automatically.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: This extension only renders and edits the content of the file you open.

commands.title: Master RTL: Open in Text Editor
Master RTL: Open in RTL Editor
Master RTL: Toggle RTL Markdown Editor
Master RTL: Insert AI Prompt Template (Claude Code / Copilot)
Master RTL: Edit AI Prompt Templates
Master RTL: Right-to-Left for Claude Code (toggle)
Master RTL: Claude Code Chat Theme…

rtlMarkdown.claudeCodeRtl.markdownDescription: Make the **Claude Code** chat panel right-to-left. Master RTL adds a small, clearly-marked, fully reversible stylesheet block to Claude Code's own webview CSS so Persian/Arabic/Hebrew/Urdu read right-to-left, while English text and code blocks stay left-to-right. Reapplies automatically after Claude Code updates. **A window reload is required** for changes to take effect. Toggle live from the status-bar **Claude RTL** button or the command **Master RTL: Right-to-Left for Claude Code**.

enumDescriptions: Use Claude Code's own colors (no theme)
rtlMarkdown.claudeCodeTheme.markdownDescription: Color theme for the **Claude Code** chat panel. Master RTL adds a small, clearly-marked, fully reversible block to Claude Code's own webview CSS that recolors the chat — backgrounds, message text, code surface, accents and links. Code syntax tokens keep following your active VS Code editor theme. Pick a theme from the status-bar **Claude Theme** button or the command **Master RTL: Claude Code Chat Theme…**. Reapplies automatically after Claude Code updates. **A window reload is required** for changes to take effect. Set to `default` to restore Claude Code's own colors.

rtlMarkdown.fontFamily.description: Font family for the editor and preview.

enumDescriptions: Editor and preview side by side
rtlMarkdown.defaultMode.description: Which view to show when a file is opened.

enumDescriptions: Follow the active VS Code color theme
Warm sepia paper — easy on the eyes
rtlMarkdown.previewTheme.description: Reading theme for the rendered preview. Can also be changed live from the toolbar.

rtlMarkdown.promptTemplates.markdownDescription: Reusable prompt templates for AI chat (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot). Pick one from the status-bar **Prompts** button or the command **Qalam: Insert Prompt Template** — it is copied to the clipboard so you can paste it into the chat box (and inserted at the cursor if a text editor is focused).

name.description: Template name shown in the picker.

body.description: The prompt text that gets copied and inserted.

default.name: Explain code
default.body: این کد را خط‌به‌خط و ساده توضیح بده:

default.name: Refactor & clean up
default.body: این کد را تمیزتر و خواناتر بازنویسی کن و دلیل هر تغییر را کوتاه توضیح بده:

default.name: Find bugs & security issues
default.body: در این کد دنبال باگ و مشکلات امنیتی بگرد و برای هرکدام راه‌حل بده:

default.name: Write tests
default.body: برای این کد تست بنویس و موارد لبه‌ای را هم پوشش بده:

default.name: Commit message
default.body: برای این تغییرات یک پیام کامیت کوتاه و واضح به انگلیسی بنویس:

default.name: Translate to English
default.body: متن زیر را به انگلیسیِ روان و حرفه‌ای ترجمه کن:
